analysis_mode.description: full: clones+metrics. clones_only: clones without metrics; run summary marks health and security_surfaces unavailable (metrics_skipped) and omits comparable entity_counts unless canonical inventory.code.scope is analysis_root. Use get_report_section(inventory) for full canonical inventory facts.

cache_path.title: Cache Path

cache_policy.description: reuse: read cache. off: skip cache. MCP read-only.
cache_policy.title: Cache Policy

run_id.title: Run Id

subject_path.description: Repo-relative path. Required for manage_engineering_memory action=record_candidate. For query_engineering_memory: required for mode=for_path; mode=coverage accepts path as a single-path alias when scope is omitted.
subject_path.title: Subject Path

finding_id.description: Short MCP finding id or full canonical finding id; get_finding returns status=not_found for unknown ids.
finding_id.title: Finding Id

run_id.description: 8-char or full run id; latest run when omitted.
run_id.title: Run Id

detail_level.description: compact (default) returns statement previews without payload; full returns complete statement and payload. mode=get always returns full.
detail_level.title: Detail Level

filters.description: Optional filters: types, statuses, confidences, match_mode (any|all, search mode only), include_routine (trajectory_search, trajectory_anomalies, trajectory_agents, trajectory_dashboard; default false excludes run:* routine workflows).
filters.title: Filters

include_drafts.description: Include draft engineering memory records. Defaults false for search; get_relevant_memory with scope or intent_id includes drafts automatically; query_engineering_memory for_path/for_symbol includes drafts without setting this flag.
include_drafts.title: Include Drafts

max_results.description: Maximum engineering memory records to return.
max_results.title: Max Results

mode.description: search, get, for_path, for_symbol, stale, drafts, coverage, status, trajectory_status, trajectory_search, trajectory_get, experience_get, trajectory_anomalies, trajectory_agents, or trajectory_dashboard. mode=coverage requires scope= (path= is a single-path alias when scope is omitted).
mode.title: Mode

path.description: Repo-relative path. Required for manage_engineering_memory action=record_candidate. For query_engineering_memory: required for mode=for_path; mode=coverage accepts path as a single-path alias when scope is omitted.
path.title: Path

query.description: Keyword query for mode=search or mode=trajectory_search.
query.title: Query

record_id.description: Record id for mode=get or IDE governance actions; trajectory id for mode=trajectory_get; experience id for mode=experience_get.
record_id.title: Record Id

scope.description: Repo-relative scope paths for engineering memory retrieval. Required for query_engineering_memory mode=coverage.
scope.title: Scope

semantic.description: Blend semantic recall into mode=search (FTS plus semantic, re-ranked); audit incidents and trajectory precedents are returned typed-separate. Requires the optional index; falls back to FTS-only when unavailable.
semantic.title: Semantic

detail_level.description: compact (bounded top rows) or normal (rows up to limit); full downgrades to normal for aggregate sections.
detail_level.title: Detail Level

limit.description: Row cap per section; clamped to [1, 50], else 10.
limit.title: Limit

operation_id.description: Reserved for detail sections; echoed in ignored_parameters.
operation_id.title: Operation Id

section.description: Telemetry section to project: summary | slow_operations | memory_pipeline_cost | db_cost | agent_context | mcp_tool_matrix | correlated_chains | costly_noops | pipeline | analysis_phase_cost.
section.title: Section

span_id.description: Reserved for detail sections; echoed in ignored_parameters.
span_id.title: Span Id

window.description: 'latest' for the recent window, or a correlation_id.
window.title: Window

blast_radius_depth.title: Blast Radius Depth

blast_radius_detail.description: summary (default) returns safety-complete slim blast with artifact lookup; full returns the compatibility blast projection inline.
blast_radius_detail.title: Blast Radius Detail

dirty_scope_policy.description: block (default) or continue_own_wip when uncommitted changes already overlap declared scope.
dirty_scope_policy.title: Dirty Scope Policy

expected_effects.description: Optional expected patch effects for review.
expected_effects.title: Expected Effects

on_conflict.description: queue to wait on overlapping workspace intents.
on_conflict.title: On Conflict

scope.description: Scope object with allowed_files, optional allowed_related, forbidden.
scope.title: Scope

strictness.description: ci, relaxed, or strict patch-contract profile.

patch_health_delta.title: Patch Health Delta

require_citations.title: Require Citations

run_id.title: Run Id

text.description: Review claims text to validate against the run.
